title: Modpack For Play
description: This modpack is designed for playing on servers with a customized texture pack. It includes mods for optimization, construction, aesthetics, utilities, and mod libraries
body:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Name Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b655a835b377c4b7ca06ab5ce31af6d46037623.png)
EN:

This modpack is created for playing on servers with a customized resourcepacks. If you don't like the pre-installed resourcepacks, you can change it. The modpack also includes optimization, construction, aesthetics, utilities, and mod libraries. Create resourcepack in [vanillatweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

RU:

Эта сборка создана для игры на серверах и одиночных игр сборка имеет кастомизированный ресурспак. Если вам не нравится встроенный текстурпак, вы можете удалить его и поставить свой. Сборка также включает в себя моды на: оптимизацию, постройку, эстетику, утилиты и библиотеки модов. Ресурспак создан на [vanillatweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.13.5+kotlin.2.2.10) (Mod Version 2.2.10)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.21.7-0.18.0-fabric) (Mod Version 0.18.0)

[Emoji Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type/version/2.3.2-1.21.6-fabric) (Mod Version 2.3.2)

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.1-beta.1+1.21.6) (Mod Version (beta 3.0.1))

[Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils/version/2.3.5) (Mod Version 2.3.5)

[Item Counts](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-counts/version/1.6.1+mc1.21.6) (Mod Version 1.6.1)

[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/version/3.0.6+mc1.21.6) (Mod Version 3.0.5)

[Nemo's Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-inventory-sorting/version/1.21.7-1.12.2) (Mod Version 1.12.2(it's a mod version))

[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/4.3.3+1.21.8) (Mod Version 4.3.3)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.129.0+1.21.7) (Mod Version 0.129.0)

[GUI Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/gui-time/version/1.4.1) (Mod Version 1.4.1)

[Double Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-hotbar/version/1.3.4-mc1.21.6-7-fabric) (Mod Version 1.3.4)

[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api/version/2.7.2+1.21.8) (Mod Version 2.7.2)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.21.6-0.6.13-fabric) (Mod Version 0.6.13)

[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/version/mc1.21.6-0.6.6+fabric) (Mod Version 0.6.6)

[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api/version/17.0.8+fabric) (Mod Version 17.0.8)

[Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective/version/1.21.7-8.4-fabric+forge+neo) (Mod Version 8.4)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/19.0.147+fabric) (Mod Version 19.0.147)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/15.0.0) (Mod Version 15.0.0 Release)

[My Resource Pack, My Choice](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-resource-pack/version/1.2.7+1.21.6) (Mod Version 1.2.7)

[YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl/version/3.7.1+1.21.6-fabric) (Mod Version 3.7.1)

[MT Random Block Placement](https://modrinth.com/mod/random-block-placement/version/1.0.5.1-1.21.7+1.21.8) (Mod Version 10.5.1)

[Accurate Block Placement Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn/version/1.3.9) (Mod Version 1.3.9)

[Ferritecore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/8.0.0-fabric) (Mod Version 8.0.0, added in Modpack For Play 1.0.3)
